pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn’t it? How are you holding up?
Hey C, I'm H. It's definitely a bit much in here, but I'm doing alright—just ready to get started. How are you feeling about everything?
I'm feeling pretty driven, honestly. I've got some people back home I'm trying to look out for, so I'm just trying to stay focused. What brought you here?
I’m in the same boat—just looking to win enough to take care of the people I care about. It feels like a lot is on the line.
I hear you. It definitely makes the pressure feel more real when it's for them. Have you thought about how you’re going to play this yet?
Honestly, I’m still figuring it out. I want to be smart about it, but it’s hard to have a set plan until things actually kick off. Do you have a strategy in mind?
I’m leaning towards cooperation, honestly—if we all clash, nobody gets anything, and I really need to make sure I bring something back for my family.
I'm on the same page. If we can find a way for everyone to walk away with something, that's a win for all our families.
I'm glad we're seeing eye to eye. It definitely makes me feel a bit better knowing there's someone else here focused on looking out for their people too.
Definitely. It helps to have that shared understanding. Good luck to both of us—let's hope we can make this work for everyone.
Absolutely. Let's stay strong and stick to the plan for our families. See you in the game.
